# Mechanism and moderation {#sec-mechanism}

::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Claude Code/Opus 4.8). Scaffold — an outline of intended content and its source artifacts, not finished prose.
:::

{{< include ../_caveats-association.qmd >}}

*[Scaffold]* Dose-response of one measure on another, and whether effects are moderated. *Source:* `mechanism_curve.csv`, interaction summaries, `*_loo_compare.csv`.

## Mechanism slopes {#sec-mechanism-slopes}

*[Scaffold]* e.g. letter-sound → word reading (LRP56–58), adjusted for a DAG-derived set and a subject random intercept; report as "associated with, after adjusting for stable level".

## Moderation {#sec-mechanism-moderation}

*[Scaffold]* Linear moderation models (LRP71, 72, 73) tested against their no-interaction baselines as clean nested PSIS-LOO comparisons; weakly identified at this sample size.

::: {.callout-note}
*[Scaffold]* The pooled group coefficient $\beta_G$ in a mechanism model is **not** a treatment contrast — both arms are on intervention through phases 1–2 (memory `project_rli_phase_structure`).
:::
